properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 53/18
NORWEGIAN SEA
ANDOEYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT TEST AND TRAINING OF MILITARY SYSTEMS 
FROM ANDOEYA. IN THE TIME PERIOD FROM MAY 28TH TO JUNE 1ST 2018.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC ARE REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF AND STAY OUTSIDE THE 
FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS DURING THE ANNOUNCED TIME PERIODS:
DANGER AREA 1 
AN AREA WITHIN THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
A. 70-02.1N 17-03.1E
B. 70-58.8N 14-24.8E
C. 69-38.8N 10-10.2E
D. 68-38.4N 12-48.6E
E. 70-02.1N 17-03.1E
DANGER AREA 2
AN AREA WITHIN THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
A. 69-08.0N 16-16.3E
B. 69-08.0N 16-37.6E
C. 69-14.2N 16-49.3E
D. 69-22.4N 16-52.6E
E. 69-24.2N 16-56.7E
F. 69-29.8N 17-12.2E
G. 69-39.3N 17-18.0E
H. 69-52.0N 16-25.0E
I. 69-26.0N 14-58.9E
J.69-21.5N 15-29.7E
K.69-27.6N 15-49.0E
L.69-24.3N 16-16.4E
M.69-08.0N 16-16.3E
ACTIVISATION OF DANGER AREAS: 28MAY-02JUNE 19:00-02:00 UTC
